password_changed.title: Password changed
password_changed.body: Your password was changed. If this wasn't you, secure your account immediately.

project_published.title: Project published
project_published.body: Your project "{title}" ({code}) is now live and accepting applications.

project_unpublished.title: Project unpublished
project_unpublished.body: Your project "{title}" ({code}) is back in configuration mode.

task_published.title: Task published
task_published.body: Task "{title}" ({code}) has been published and is now open for consultants.

top_up_completed.title: Top-up successful
top_up_completed.body: Your top-up of {amount} {currency} was credited to your account.

top_up_refunded.title: Top-up refunded
top_up_refunded.body: Your top-up of {amount} {currency} has been refunded to your original payment method.

withdraw_completed.title: Withdrawal sent
withdraw_completed.body: Your withdrawal of {amount} {currency} has been processed.

withdraw_reversed.title: Withdrawal reversed
withdraw_reversed.body: Your withdrawal of {amount} {currency} was reversed: {reason}. The amount has been credited back.

consultant_project_skill_match.title: New project matching your skills
consultant_project_skill_match.body: A new project "{title}" ({code}) matching your skills has been published.

consultant_project_joined.title: You joined a project
consultant_project_joined.body: You have been added to project "{title}" ({code}). Head to the board to get started.

admin_business_onboarded.title: New business registered
admin_business_onboarded.body: {name} has completed onboarding and is ready to post projects.

admin_task_published.title: Task published
admin_task_published.body: Task "{title}" ({code}) in project {project} was published by {business}.

admin_consultant_onboarding_submitted.title: Onboarding submitted: {name}
admin_consultant_onboarding_submitted.body: {name} has submitted their onboarding interview and is awaiting review.

consultant_onboarding_approved.title: Your account has been verified
consultant_onboarding_approved.body: Welcome to Plys! Your account is verified — you can now register skills and take exams.

consultant_onboarding_rejected.title: Onboarding decision: not approved
consultant_onboarding_rejected.body: Your onboarding was not approved. You can re-apply after {blocked_until}. Reason: {reason}

consultant_skill_exam_submitted.title: Skill exam submitted
consultant_skill_exam_submitted.body: Your {skill} exam is being evaluated. We'll notify you when it's done.

low_score.title: Skill exam result: did not pass
low_score.body: Your {skill} exam scored {final_score}%, below the 80% pass threshold. You can retake after {cooldown_until}.

copyleaks.title: Skill exam flagged for AI-generated content
copyleaks.body: Your {skill} answers were flagged. You may retake after {cooldown_until}. {strikes_remaining} attempt(s) remain before your account is permanently disabled.

expired.title: Skill exam expired
expired.body: Your {skill} exam timer ran out before you submitted. After 3 expired attempts you will be paused from taking exams for 2 days.

senior.title: Skill exam passed — senior!
senior.body: Nice work — you passed {skill} with {final_score}% as senior.

expert.title: Skill exam passed — expert!
expert.body: Outstanding — you passed {skill} with {final_score}% as expert.

consultant_account_banned.title: Account permanently disabled
consultant_account_banned.body: Your account has been permanently disabled after repeated AI-generated content violations. If you believe this is in error, contact support.

failed.title: Skill exam {outcome}: {consultant}
failed.body: {consultant} did not pass the {skill} exam ({score}%) — outcome: {outcome}.
